body:
id: GO:0102177
name: 24-methylenelophenol methyl oxidase activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: 24-methylenelophenol + O2 + NADH + H+ = 4alpha-hydroxymethyl-ergosta-7,24(241)-dien-3beta-ol + NAD + H2O." [GOC:pz, PMID:11707264, RHEA:58872]
xref: EC:1.14.18.11 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: MetaCyc:RXN-11930
xref: RHEA:58872 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
is_a: GO:0016709 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on paired donors, with incorporation or reduction of molecular oxygen, NAD(P)H as one donor, and incorporation of one atom of oxygen
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/30193" xsd:anyURI


EC:1.14.18.11 (xref above) does not match the rest of the GO term description:
Name: plant 4alpha-monomethylsterol monooxygenase
reaction: 24-methylidenelophenol + 6 Fe(II)-[cytochrome b5] + 3 O2 + 5 H(+) = 4alpha-carboxy-ergosta-7,24(24(1))-dien-3beta-ol + 6 Fe(III)-[cytochrome b5] + 4 H2O
has RHEA xref: RHEA:58868

RHEA:58872 (xref above) is "part of RHEA:58868", and has this reaction:
24-methylidenelophenol + 2 Fe(II)-[cytochrome b5] + O2 + 2 H(+) = 4alpha-hydroxymethyl-ergosta-7,24(24(1))-dien-3beta-ol + 2 Fe(III)-[cytochrome b5] + H2O.


There are 3 IEA (via EC:1.14.18.11) annotations to GO:0102177 by UniProt to Arabidopsis Methylsterol monooxygenase SMO1-3, SMO2-1 and SMO2-2.

Tasks:
- [x] Change RHEA def and term xref to RHEA:58868 (and remove the unnecessary GOC:pz def xref)
- [x] Change MetaCyc xref to MetaCyc:RXN-19724
- [x] Update name to '4alpha-monomethylsterol monooxygenase activity' to match EC
- [x] Update def to "Catalysis of the reaction: 24-methylidenelophenol + 6 Fe(II)-[cytochrome b5] + 3 O2 + 5 H+ = 4alpha-carboxy-ergosta-7,24(24(1))-dien-3beta-ol + 6 Fe(III)-[cytochrome b5] + 4 H2O"
- [x] Change parent to GO:0016716 (EC:1.14.18.- )
title: GO:0102177 24-methylenelophenol methyl oxidase activity
